title: Driver Fatigue Detection (Trans Track)
subtitle: Industrial collaboration with Bandung Techno Park and Trans Track: real-time fatigue detection for commercial fleet dashcams

highlights: Built a dataset downloader pipeline to pull alarm events and dashcam videos directly from the TransTrack platform, covering real-world driving data from mining company fleets: BIB, PAMA MTBU, and SIS
Designed and trained MultiscaleTCN: 3 parallel TCN branches with different dilation scales (fine [1,2,4,8], medium [2,4,8,16], coarse [4,8,16,32]) for multi-scale temporal fatigue pattern recognition
Input: 200-frame sequences of facial landmark features (EAR left/right, MAR, head pitch/yaw/roll, nose position) extracted via MediaPipe Holistic at 10 FPS, 11 scalar channels
3-class output: eyes_closed, normal, yawning; achieved test accuracy = 0.85, macro F1 = 0.78, an 11% F1 improvement over the company's prior single-modality baseline

Built FastAPI cloud review service with Redis queue: endpoint returns HTTP 202 immediately; background worker downloads MP4, extracts landmarks, runs inference, and POSTs verdict to TransTrack callback URL
Implemented two business logic rules: night-hour heuristic (00:00-05:59, confidence < 0.75 escalates) and driver history rule (2 or more fatigue events within 1 hour escalates)
Deployed as 3-service Docker stack: Redis, API (port 8000), and async worker; supported mock servers for local dev testing
39-test suite covering unit, pipeline, and live integration tests against the production MDVR server
